title: Update footer copyright text to Smart Watt Nexus and remove McAffine Ink

requirements.text: In the footer section of Layout.tsx (and any other component that renders a footer), update the copyright text to read '© Smart Watt Nexus' and remove any reference to 'McAffine Ink' or similar third-party branding. The footer should only display the Smart Watt Nexus brand name with an appropriate copyright year.

quotes: Update the footer copyright text to smartwatt nexus and remove mcaffine ink in the footer

acceptanceCriteria: The footer copyright text reads '© Smart Watt Nexus' (or '© [year] Smart Watt Nexus') with no mention of 'McAffine Ink' or any other third-party name.
The footer appears consistently across all authenticated pages that use the Layout component.
No other footer content or layout is altered.

constraints: Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
Do not change any other footer content, layout, or styling beyond the copyright text update.
nonGoals: Adding new footer links or sections.
Changing any page content outside the footer.
